    def _build_binary_if_missing():
        binary = os.path.join(PROJECT_DIR, "myapp")
        if not os.path.isfile(binary):
            result = subprocess.run(
                ["go", "build", "-o", "myapp", "."],
                cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
                capture_output=True,
                text=True,
                check=False,
            )
